{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324015851BFB8AF89387EE2752DCB\"}"},"total":13567},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7550778041697288984","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者（网络黑侠）十年磨一剑，续写新的网游之死亡武侠以独特的书中的故事情节跌宕起伏，精彩纷呈用引人入胜，让人非常有代入感仿佛身临其境。且游戏人物描写有血有肉，且以曾经《全球论剑》《练级狂人在异界》等小说来看，新开的网游小说亦很有期待感，且让我们期待忘川在《灵域》风起天南吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758059028,"group_id":"7539818151354059838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一袭青衣,染就一树芳华","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz/tT0Ay22O/keR5JVvh6RU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8adf4de6375f4ab79332d39a25bfa48b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776875702\u0026x-signature=KLugBB6UO2veUCyVTC4UbPJw%2F98%3D","user_id":"92819773982782","user_name":"ᥫᩣˊˊ白衣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92819773982782","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":185,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539818151354059838","book_info":{"abstract":"穷困潦倒健身博主苏忘川，碰到游戏工作室高薪招募打金搬砖，入职后发现不对劲，自己的力气怎么好像变大了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c6a381459a7a3e103c38e5e30167c8c2","author":"夜眸藏锋","author_id":"","book_id":"7539818151354059838","book_name":"网游之死亡武侠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"40.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":746,\"name\":\"游戏体育\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746\u0026name=游戏体育\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026sourc
